title: 12w02a
description: A modpack recreating a lost 1.1 snapshot, with (most) of it's features intact.
body:
# Minecraft 12w02a
A while back, a Mojang employee posted what seemed to be a lost snapshot version of 1.1. Strangely, any attempts I made to reupload the .jar file failed, so this pack was made to recreate the version using assets pulled from the jar file.

_There's something out there..._

![house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb4bc41adc92dd92991d48f688042b19e4673e83.png)

# Modpack Details
**DON'T CLICK UNLESS YOU'VE PLAYED THE PACK ALREADY!** It's best if you go in without any prior knowledge of what it has, trust me.
<details>
<summary>SPOILERS</summary>
This pack pretty much completely reverts the game back to 1.1. This means no extra wood types other than Oak wood, early sounds, no new mobs, etc. While some modern minecraft stuff is still included (the Mace, ancient cities, etc.) most have been stripped back for the sake of accuracy.
This also means skins & capes will NOT work. You will play as Steve and you will like it.

This pack also includes a bunch of QOL features I thought should've been in the game by now, such as little animations whenever you pick up items in the inventory, faster ladders, durability percentage tooltip, etc.

----
Also **THIS IS A HORROR PACK**. This pack attempts to creep you out as you play, through weird structures, events, and more. Be warned. 
</details>
